headline: SLB Scheduled to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: SLB enters second-quarter earnings season with stronger oil price tailwinds, though lower earnings expectations may weigh on the upcoming report.

headline: Earnings Preview: Mirion Technologies, Inc. (MIR) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Mirion Technologies (MIR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
